title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez in Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Land Bank of the Philippines to Avail Its Livelihood Loan Facility for Local Government Units and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 06/08/2020)
